2026-04-14T18:34:07.3908206Z ---
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3908569Z description: |
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3909134Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3910168Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3911395Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3918270Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3918546Z on:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3918939Z   push:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3919299Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3919736Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3920006Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3920182Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3920482Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3920645Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3920895Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3921065Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3921470Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3922379Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3922776Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3923133Z   noop:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3923514Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3923971Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3924334Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3925087Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3925972Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3926466Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3926969Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3927569Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3927980Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3928400Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3928806Z       steps:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3929214Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3929796Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3930330Z           env:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3931034Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3932053Z           with:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3932533Z             script: |
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3933103Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3933865Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3934662Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3935398Z                 return;
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3935808Z               }
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3936043Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3936655Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3937517Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3938164Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3938704Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3939740Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3940756Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3942091Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3942816Z               }
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3943099Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3944960Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3945693Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3946201Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3946820Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3947352Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3947942Z               });
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3948476Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T18:34:07.3949007Z

2026-04-14T18:34:07.4074432Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4074990Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4075385Z     max: 1

2026-04-14T18:34:07.4077493Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4077997Z   jobs:

2026-04-14T18:34:07.4079131Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4080024Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4080524Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4081035Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4081642Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4082384Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4082834Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4083255Z       steps:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4083662Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4084263Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4084811Z           env:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4085509Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4086391Z           with:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4086774Z             script: |
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4087361Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4088136Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4088928Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4090087Z                 return;
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4090505Z               }
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4090739Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4090988Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4092104Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4092779Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4093345Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4095690Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4096866Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4098210Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4098942Z               }
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4099182Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4099496Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4100190Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4100704Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4110428Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4111023Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4111641Z               });
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4112455Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4113047Z 
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4169432Z tools:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4169869Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4170249Z   github:
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4170633Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4170976Z

2026-04-14T18:34:07.4172423Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4173303Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T18:34:07.4187906Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
